content.Text:
[Wed 2026-04-22 05:33 PDT] Add a new "Smart Knowledge Map" module to the agenticchat app. This is a browser-based AI chat interface where all features are IIFE modules appended to app.js and styled in style.css.

## Feature: Smart Knowledge Map (Alt+Shift+K)
An autonomous knowledge graph that extracts entities, concepts, and relationships from conversation messages and displays them as an interactive force-directed graph visualization.

## What it does:
1. Monitors conversation messages (user + assistant) and extracts:
   - Key entities (people, tools, technologies, concepts mentioned)
   - Relationships between them (e.g., "uses", "relates to", "depends on")
   - Entity frequency/importance (node size scales with mentions)
2. Builds an interactive force-directed graph on a Canvas element:
   - Nodes = entities, sized by frequency, colored by category (person=blue, tech=green, concept=purple, action=orange)
   - Edges = relationships with labels
   - Click node to highlight connections, show entity details
   - Drag nodes to rearrange, zoom with scroll wheel
   - Search/filter entities
3. Auto-updates as new messages arrive
4. Export graph as JSON or PNG
5. "Insights" panel showing: top entities, emerging topics, knowledge gaps (mentioned but unexplored entities)

## Implementation Pattern (CRITICAL - follow exactly):
- Module is an IIFE: `const SmartKnowledgeMap = (function() { ... })();`
- Append to END of app.js (after the ConversationCoach module)
- Add CSS to END of style.css
- Use `document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', ...)` for init
- Register keyboard shortcut Alt+Shift+K via KeyboardShortcuts.register
- Register command palette entry via CommandPalette.register
- Register slash command /knowledgemap via SlashCommands.register
- Panel is a slide-out overlay (like other panels in the app)
- Canvas-based force-directed graph (no external libs - implement from scratch)
- Entity extraction is heuristic/NLP-based (no API calls) - use capitalized words, quoted terms, code terms, frequent nouns
- Use the TextAnalytics module if available for tokenization/TF-IDF
- Store graph data in SafeStorage (localStorage wrapper)

## Entity Extraction Rules:
- Capitalized multi-word phrases (proper nouns): "Machine Learning", "React Native"
- Code/tech terms: words in backticks, camelCase, PascalCase, UPPER_CASE
- Quoted terms
- Frequent non-stopword terms (use TextAnalytics.tokenise and stopword filtering)
- Co-occurrence within same message = relationship edge

## Graph Physics:
- Simple force-directed layout: repulsion between all nodes, attraction along edges, centering force
- Animate with requestAnimationFrame, cool down over time
- Minimum node spacing, edge length targets

## UI Structure:
- Overlay panel (right side, 500px wide) with:
  - Header: "🧠 Knowledge Map" + close button
  - Canvas area (fills most of panel) for the graph
  - Below canvas: search input for filtering
  - Tabs: "Graph" | "Insights" | "Export"
  - Insights tab: top 10 entities table, emerging topics list, knowledge gaps
  - Export tab: JSON download, PNG download buttons

## Files to modify:
1. app.js - append the SmartKnowledgeMap IIFE at the very end
2. style.css - append styles at the end
3. index.html - add a toolbar button: `<button id="knowledge-map-btn" class="toolbar-btn" title="Knowledge Map (Alt+Shift+K)">🧠</button>` in the toolbar area near other feature buttons

## Before finishing:
- Run `node -c app.js` to verify syntax
- Run `node -c sw.js` to verify service worker still parses
- Make sure no syntax errors

## Git:
- Stage all changes
- Commit with message: "feat: Smart Knowledge Map - autonomous entity extraction with interactive force-directed graph visualization

Adds knowledge graph that autonomously extracts entities and relationships from conversations:
- Heuristic NLP entity extraction (proper nouns, tech terms, frequent concepts)
- Interactive Canvas force-directed graph with drag, zoom, click-to-highlight
- Auto-updates as conversation progresses
- Insights panel with top entities, emerging topics, knowledge gaps
- Export as JSON or PNG
- Toggle: Alt+Shift+K | Slash: /knowledgemap"
- Do NOT create a branch or PR. Just commit to current branch.
I’m inspecting the app structure first so I can place the new module exactly where this codebase expects it, then I’ll patch `app.js`, `style.css`, and `index.html` in the existing feature pattern.
`rg` is not installed here, so I’m switching to PowerShell-native search and pulling the relevant module boundaries and registration patterns before I draft the new IIFE.

ToolUse.name: Run Select-String -Path app.js -Pattern 'const ConversationCoach = \(function\(\)' | Select-Object -First 1 | ForEach-Object { $_.LineNumber }
